name: IntroDB Skip
description: Automatically skip TV show intros using IntroDB and IntroHater.
overview: Sync intro markers from IntroDB and IntroHater APIs to support skip intro workflows.

versions.changelog: V2.2.0 - Added Chapter Injection. Intros now appear as chapters in the timeline for Android support. Added toggle in settings.
V2.1.1 - Fixed marker leakage. Markers from previous shows are now cleared when a new one starts. Includes Next Episode Pre-fetching.
